subject: [RFC PATCH v4 09/27] mm/khugepaged: skip private node folios when trying to collapse.

reviews.author: Gregory Price
reviews.summary: No substantive comments or reviews have been provided yet. The thread is currently waiting for reviewer input.

2026-02-22.patch_summary: This RFC patch proposes to modify the khugepaged functionality to skip private node folios when attempting to collapse large memory pages. The goal is to prevent potential issues such as LRU inversion and promote pages from private nodes to local nodes, which may defeat memory tiering.
